direction: Post-apocalypse large-map survival against zombie hordes with a full weapon system and safehouse expansion.
visual_differentiation_axes: asymmetrical field-kit HUD instead of mirrored top capsules
route compass and weapon tower as the dominant gameplay UI motif
dust-metal hazard palette instead of neon or fantasy color signatures
scavenger helmet and rifle icon subject instead of generic tower or crate imagery
bench-style upgrade screens and folded map overlays instead of simple card stacks
forbidden_visual_reuse: do not reuse a top HUD pill trio with a bottom-wide action strip as the main layout
do not reuse bright cyan sci-fi accents as the primary palette
do not reuse a castle, tower, plant, crate, or plain zombie head as the icon subject
do not reuse another game's untouched exported icon badge
do not reuse a generic rounded arcade panel set without rugged field motifs

ui_identity.layout_archetype: left survival rig plus top route compass plus right weapon tower plus bottom utility strip
ui_identity.hud_composition: stacked gauges on the left, narrow compass ribbon at top center, tall weapon column on the right, compact contextual actions at bottom center
ui_identity.navigation_model: hub safehouse screens feed into a fold-out regional map, then into field missions and bench-style drawers for upgrades and loadout
ui_identity.palette_signature: ash beige, rust orange, oxidized brown, soot black, muted parchment, and hazard amber
ui_identity.material_language: worn metal plates, scratched acrylic, stitched canvas tabs, field tape labels, and hazard paint accents
ui_identity.typography_style: condensed tactical sans for labels with broad distressed numerals for ammo and survival gauges
unique_screen_motifs: field-map fold lines across pause and world-map screens
weapon bench slot clamps on upgrade drawers
radio mast distress pulses on menu and objective notifications
forbidden_ui_elements: top-only stat pills as the main HUD identity
full-width bottom command deck dominating the screen

icon_identity.subject: masked frontier scavenger helmet with a rifle crossing a route marker
icon_identity.silhouette: broad triangular helmet mass over a diagonal long-gun slash with one bright contamination eye
icon_identity.composition: helmet centered slightly high, rifle crossing the lower third, route marker notch behind the visor, ash burst framing the badge
icon_identity.palette: ember orange, rust brown, charcoal black, pale ash beige, and one acid-green contamination accent
icon_identity.background: dark charcoal badge with smoke haze and dust sparks, not a flat color chip
icon_identity.game_specific_motif: the crossed rifle and route marker signal frontier travel and weaponized zombie survival at the same time
forbidden_icon_reuse: no tower or crate foreground object
